title: Altora

{{Quote|A particularly lethal mass of destruction, the altagak has been described by natives of the planet Altora as 'high speed death on four legs.' This description accurately depicts the favorite pastime of this reptilian predator indigenous to Altora's southern savannahs.|Holobrochure for the Tagge Holographic Museum of Chandrila|<ref name="Creatures" />}}
'''Altora''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Dalonbian sector/Legends|Dalonbian sector]]. It had a [[Temperature/Legends|warm]] climate in its southern regions, and plains and [[Savanna/Legends|savannahs]] on its surface. Those [[Grass/Legends|grasslands]] were home to the [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Diet/Legends|predators]] known as [[altagak]]s. The creatures [[Hunting/Legends|hunted]] herd animals kept by the planet's [[Farmer/Legends|ranchers]], causing the latter to post large [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]] on altagak hides.

==Description==
{{Quote|A solitary hunter, the altagak enjoys the warmth of the planet's southern clime, often spending a good portion of each day basking in the sun, until aroused by the prospect of prey.|Holobrochure for the Tagge Holographic Museum of Chandrila|<ref name="Creatures" />}}
Altora was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Creatures" /> located in the [[Altora system/Legends|Altora system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Dalonbian sector/Legends|Dalonbian sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] a single [[Star/Legends|sun]], and the planet's southern regions had a [[Temperature/Legends|warm]] climate. Those areas featured plains and [[Savanna/Legends|savannahs]] covered in tall [[Grass/Legends|grasses]].<ref name="Creatures" />

[[File:Altagak.jpg|right|thumb|280px|Altagak, a native predatory species]]
Altora's southern grasslands were [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to [[altagak]]s, stealthy and fast [[Diet/Legends|predatory]] [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Limb/Legends|quadrupeds]] referred to by the planet's natives as "high speed [[Death/Legends|death]] on four legs." Other than the altagak, which was one of the few predatory [[Species/Legends|species]] on Altora, the fauna of the planet's grasslands included a variety of large herd animals. Altagaks frequently [[Hunting/Legends|hunted]] the pack creatures for [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]], but shortages of game sometimes forced the predators to attack [[Endothermy|warm-blooded]] [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] instead.<ref name="Creatures" />

==History==
During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Altora was mentioned in an entry dedicated to the altagak within a [[Holo-brochure|holobrochure]] for the [[Tagge Holographic Museum]] of [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]].<ref name="Creatures" />

==Inhabitants==
{{Quote|<nowiki></nowiki>''[...]'' the voracious appetite of the average altagak has resulted in large bounties being placed on altagak hides in recent years. Despite this, altagak depredations on rancher herds are a continuing problem that threatens the fragile economy of the planet.|Holobrochure for the Tagge Holographic Museum of Chandrila|<ref name="Creatures" />}}
Altora had a fragile economy supported by ranch [[Farm/Legends|farming]], although it was threatened by altagak attacks on herd animals. The long average lifespan and alpha predator status of the former creatures caused the local [[Farmer/Legends|ranchers]] to place large [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]] on altagak hides.<ref name="Creatures" />

==Behind the scenes==
Altora was first mentioned in the [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook ''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]'', which served as a supplement to ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Creatures" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Altora [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet Altora, in grid square L-3.<ref name="TEA" />
